description.value: Your nanites form into a network of hardlight projectors to create a protective barrier. You can cast the shield cantrip as an arcane innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up. When you use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Shield Block] reaction granted by the spell, your nanites surge back into your body, allowing you to Step as part of the same reaction.
